title: MrBoss's Fantasy Races
description: This is a mod that adds new races to the game.
body:
WARNING: THIS MOD IS A HUGE WIP AT THE MOMMENT





This Mod adds over 10 new races to the game that will change how you play the game


NOTE: You get a random one when you spawn into the game [You can set your Race by using /reroll over and over again or just go into creative and use all of those items to do it]


It also has a mode to make the game harder [Age/Thirst/Disease] [Can be turned on and off by changing the gamerules]



[Wiki](https://mrbosss-fantasy-races.fandom.com/wiki/MrBoss%27s_Fantasy_Races_Wiki)



---Here is a list of some of the Races this mod adds---

Zombie [Your life will be more comfortable than other Undeads]

Vampire [Be a Night Walker and survive off the Blood of your enemies]

Giant [BE BIG AND GO GRRRRRR]

Werewolf [You can Hunt with ease]

Human [Not much really changes with you ._.]

Mage [Use the power Sorcery]

Angel [Fight Against The Evil Of This World]

Demon [Fight Against The Good Of This World]

Fairy [Protect the Forest and Live there]

and some more

---Extra Info---

You can find WAY more info on the Wiki and in the Discord Server

---Requirements---

Pehkui [You can play without it but some of the races will be WAY worse off]

Forge 1.20.1
